title: Morrt
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Kufbrug_SWJ14.jpg]] |name=Morrt
feeding on [[Kufbrug]] |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length=1-5 [[Centimeter/Legends|cm]] |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} The '''morrts''' were a furry [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] [[Blood/Legends|bloodsuckers]] native to [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. ==Biology and appearance== Morrts were small, [[Slug/Legends|slug-like]] parasites that sucked the [[Blood/Legends|blood]] from their hosts. Their skin gave off mild [[Anesthetic/Legends|anesthetic]].{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime}} Morrts gave off a "sweetish stink." ==Behavior== Wild morrts would swarm their target and drain it dry. Domesticated morrts were very tame and docile, and could easily be removed by their tails. ==History== The native [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] had great affection for these creatures and found them adorable. The number of morrts feeding on a Gamorrean was a status symbol among [[Gender/Legends|males]] with clan leaders and warriors having up to twenty of these creatures feeding on them at a time. {{Creature-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]'' *''[[Jedi Trial]]'' *{{WEGCite|story=Preparing for War|book=The Far Orbit Project}} *{{WEGCite|story=Ortugg's Letter Home|book=The Star Wars Sourcebook|reprint=1}} {{Mo}} *''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' *''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}} *{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime|reprint=1}} *''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The Star Wars Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Star Wars Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]] *{{JournalCite|10|A Free-Trader's Guide to the Planets}} *''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' *{{FactFile|2|GAM 1-4|Gamorreans}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|species|gamorrean|Gamorrean}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Morrt |nl=Morrt |pt=Morrt (espécie) }} [[Category:Creatures of Gamorr]] [[Category:Creatures of unspecified biology]] [[Category:Gamorrean culture]] [[Category:Parasitic creatures]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]]
